title: Determine pest control techniques
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Determine pest control techniques demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess targeted pest

pcs.text: Identify the biology and characteristics of the target pest
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the biology and characteristics of the target pest?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the biology and characteristics of the target pest.

pcs.text: Observe and confirm the location and extent of the pest problem
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe and confirm the location and extent of the pest problem?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe and confirm the location and extent of the pest problem.

pcs.text: Observe and confirm target pest behaviour and movement patterns
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe and confirm target pest behaviour and movement patterns?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe and confirm target pest behaviour and movement patterns.

pcs.text: Assess the impact of the pest on assets
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the impact of the pest on assets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the impact of the pest on assets.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess targeted pest

elements.title: Assess pest control techniques

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify biosecurity risks associated with control methods.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine legislative, economic or social constraints on pest control techniques.

pcs.text: Identify non-target species and constraints that they may impose
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify non-target species and constraints that they may impose?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify non-target species and constraints that they may impose.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the impact that urban areas will have on the planning of pest control techniques.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify permits, licenses or clearances required to carry out pest control activities.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the relative humaneness of pest control techniques, where target pests include animals.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine control measures to address identified constraints.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify safety hazards associated with control measures and apply relevant health and safety in the workplace policies and procedures to manage risks.

pcs.text: Discuss and confirm the most appropriate technique for the situation with the stakeholder, and the desired outcome

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss and confirm the most appropriate technique for the situation with the stakeholder, and the desired outcome.
